channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Steam Deck OLED price increase announced
item.content:encoded:
A $240 increase for the 512GB model, $300 increase for the 1TB model.

Valve has announced a price increase for Steam Deck OLED “due to rising memory and storage costs,” as well as that both the 512 gigabyte and one terabyte models are back in stock.

The new prices are as follows:

  • Steam Deck OLED (512GB)
    • Now $789 USD; CAD 1,129; EUR 779; GBP 649; AUD 1,199; PLN 3,279
    • Previously $549 USD; CAD 689; EUR 549; GBP 479
  • Steam Deck OLED (1TB)
    • Now $949 USD; CAD 1,349; EUR 919; GBP 779; AUD 1,429; PLN 3,879
    • Previously $649 USD; CAD 819; EUR 679; GBP 569

It should be noted that Valve certified refurbished models, including the LCD model, are also available at cheaper price points.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/steam-deck-oled-price-increase-announced
